headline: P&L exposure: ₹40.7 Cr direct and indirect cost (engine estimate) + potential ₹100-200 Cr green financing opportunity (speculative)
what_matters: Potential P/E compression of 0.05-0.1x due to supply chain risk and negative ESG sentiment; margin erosion of 13.1 bps; revenue at risk: ₹2.2 Cr direct (engine estimate).
Cost of capital could rise by 20-40 bps due to BRSR/TCFD non-disclosure and FII outflow (engine estimate). Bond spreads may widen if ESG ratings deteriorate.
Tier 1 and Tier 2 suppliers affected by LNG/LPG shortages and increased freight costs, leading to cascading input price hikes and production delays.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹40.7 Cr direct and indirect cost (engine estimate) + potential ₹100-200 Cr green financing opportunity (speculative)
Revenue at risk: ₹2.2 Cr direct (engine estimate)
